data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision making by limiting choices.
data.technical_spec: Optimized UI elements for quick navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements sized appropriately for easy interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable buttons for video controls.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together for intuitive access.
data.technical_spec: Clustered UI components for user-friendly layout.

data.title: Visual Hierarchy
data.description: Utilizes size and color to guide user attention.
data.technical_spec: Contrasting colors and fonts to highlight key features.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Design based on perception patterns to improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent alignment and symmetry in layout.
